feed.title: Memedroid

entry.title: Gotta admit those videos are fun to watch
Be sure to use your grounding blanket while sleeping on the floor

entry.title: Why am I just hearing about this now? These "brothers" wrote the matrix then both became trannies??!!

Randolph Mantooth has passed away. He was 80 years old. "Rest in Peace, Johnny."
Letting the person call off but then reprimanding somebody for taking their day off is some scary work ?
Never ever show weakness to a woman. It will only be used against you.
Wyt ppl dun season they guns
Do you know where you are going?
Its over anakin, i have the shotgun
4 upvotes and i will comment a slur on the meme above me and an african country on the meme under me
Its obscure meme month. and starting from now ill be posting weekly a meme with an unheard of format
the time the seagulls rise up is upon us. soon no french fries will be left unpeckered and no car will go unpooped
